name: Browser Agent
description: Uses web browsing and LLM reasoning to find detailed contact information for each prospect company.

step_a.name: Direct Search (Required)
step_a.description: Search [company name] + contact/email/about; visit website, LinkedIn, and business directories

step_b.name: Heuristic Discovery (v1.1, optional)
step_b.description: Identify similar companies based on industry/product overlap and repeat Step A

output_schema.contact_form_url: Web form URL if no email found
